description: IllumiDesk appears to provide a web service/API hosted at api.illumidesk.com. The available machine-readable documentation describes user registration and JWT-based access to application resources such as user and server-related endpoints.
summary: IllumiDesk exposes one documented HTTP API at https://api.illumidesk.com, described by a curated OpenAPI mirror and authenticated with a bearer JWT obtained from its auth endpoints.
